productDisplayName: Wildcraft Unisex Grey Printed Laptop Backpack
description: Grey printed laptop backpackOne padded haul loop and two padded and adjustable shoulder strapsTwo main zip compartments with an inner laptop sleeve that is secured with a Velcro closure and a zip pocket that is attached to the liningTwo external zip pockets on the frontA stash pocket and a zip pocket on either sideWarranty: 5 years from the date of purchase against manufacturing defectsNote: The inner lining material/colour may vary from what is shown in the imageDisclaimer: Please note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
